purpose: Maintain current-season team configuration snapshots so lineup, availability and structural-change data exist before match-level analysis.

source_policy.tier_1: Official club, league, federation and competition sources when available.
source_policy.tier_2: ESPN public team/roster/injury/transaction surfaces and FotMob team squad/injury surfaces.
source_policy.tier_3: TheSportsDB free team/player registry as identity and roster fallback.
source_policy.news_rule: News/social reports may only create a provisional change flag unless corroborated by an official or independent structured source.

weekly_process: Discover latest active-season teams for all 17 domains.
Capture one timestamped snapshot per team.
Compare against the previous snapshot and record roster/coach/availability changes.
Run shadow residual eligibility test; do not alter formal probabilities from unvalidated configuration features.
Persist snapshot and audit receipt to GitHub.
